About Me

Building with purpose,
learning with passion

I'm Aiswarya V, a Bachelor of Information Technology student at Sri Krishna College of Technology, Coimbatore, on track to graduate in 2027 with a CGPA of 8.16.

My focus is on full stack development — crafting clean mobile UIs with Flutter, building REST API backends, and exploring the intersection of software and intelligence through Machine Learning.

I thrive in collaborative environments, lead with curiosity, and push the boundaries of what I build — from deepfake detection models to automated workflow systems.

Mobile apps, AI models, automation workflows, and full-stack systems.

Project · 01
E-Commerce Web Application

A full-featured e-commerce platform with Flutter-based mobile UI supporting 20+ products with dynamic filtering. Includes an admin dashboard for managing products and orders.

Attendance Automation System
